title: feat(switchboard): close jacks on PR merge via GitHub webhook
description: When a PR opens, jacks move to pending review (not closed). When PR merges, auto-close via GitHub webhook. Parse 'Closes butiq-xxx' from PR body, run bd close. Also update Cleo subagent task templates to not close jacks on PR open.

title: Learning loop: decision notes + pattern surfacing in sw done/resume
description:
Add a lightweight learning loop to sw done and sw resume.

sw done: add --decision/-D flag for a short freeform note capturing the non-obvious insight that unblocked the jack (what was hard, what was the key decision). Store this as a first-class Qdrant field alongside commit_msg and diff_summary.

sw resume: surface 2-3 semantically similar past jacks alongside the TSO, showing their decision notes. This gives the agent picking up a jack immediate access to 'here is what worked last time on similar work.'

Inspired by Ruflo's RETRIEVE->JUDGE->DISTILL->CONSOLIDATE->ROUTE loop, but scoped to our 1-3 agent use case — no swarm machinery needed. The value is in the decision note being required on closure, not in routing complexity.

title: sw init + sw repo add: workspace bootstrap commands
sw create: wrap bd create with hold/checkpoint type support
Cross-repo flow test: component-lib to main-app triggers_update
Qdrant overlay: index task completions with commit + diff context
feat(switchboard): ADR auto-generation skill on PR merge
description: On PR merge, if diff meets significance threshold (schema changes, new modules, auth patterns), generate an ADR stub and commit to docs/decisions/. Depends on close-on-merge webhook being solid first.

title: feat(switchboard): use CocoIndex for code-aware butiq indexing (feeds Qdrant)
description: Qdrant size-based chunking splits code mid-function. CocoIndex understands code structure (functions, classes, modules) and does incremental updates. Wire CocoIndex → Qdrant for butiq monorepo. https://cocoindex.io

title: sw show: wrap bd show with rich formatting
jack-xxxx ID prefix: ensure all IDs use jack- not bd- in sw output
Review and publish: README polish + CleoOpenClaw repo description
